- Restored the correct name for Modal_Usage_Cookie_Detect.

### Accessibility Rules

#### Improvements
- Updated the Link_AdjacentHref_Redundant rule with improved detection logic.
- Added autofix support for missing iframe name attributes.

#### Bug Fixes

### HelpDesk

#### New Features
- Added RTL (Hebrew) language support for HelpDesk.

#### Bug Fixes
- Fixed RTL text alignment by correctly inheriting text direction in the CSS reset.
- Fixed site-menu cross-frame functionality, keyboard navigation, and Alt+M shortcut issues.
- Fixed a translation issue in the HelpDesk screen reader content.

### Internationalization

#### Improvements
- Improved performance by skipping CDN fetch for English locale files.

name: Week of February 16, 2026
rawChanges: move autofixes to their own folders to cleanup
Bump the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory with 7 updates

generatedNotes:
### New Features

- Added a new Carousel component and FixCarousel for resolving carousel-related accessibility issues.
- Added an autofix for invalid ARIA roles.
- Added an autofix for missing button roles.
- Added a helper for announcing real-time effects fixes to users via ARIA live regions.
- Added the ability to fill in missing metadata.
- Added click and keyboard event handling to the skip link auto-remediation, along with end-to-end test coverage.

### Improvements

- Rules configuration loading is now deferred to allow the page more time to initialize.
- Fix failures and issue validation failures are now reported separately for clearer diagnostics.
- Improved detection of accessibility regressions.
- Source fix rules no longer emit unfixed problems unnecessarily.
- Added an npm alias for the a11y-testing 11x version to support Autofixes.
- Rules files are now included in the published package.

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed the release and publish process to correctly include the Carousel component.
- Fixed an issue with the site menu not behaving as expected.

### services-v2

#### New Features
- Added the ability to disable regular rules in the scanner.

### a11y-testing

#### Bug Fixes

#### Improvements

### Real-Time Effects

#### New Features
- Added an excludeItems API for FixSiteMenu, allowing specific items to be excluded from fixes.
- Added a validation phase to the fix pipeline.
- Added testMode() for composite fix debug logging.

#### Bug Fixes
- Fixed an issue where legacy real-time effects did not run when other conditions were met.
- Added tracking for fix failed verification as an implementation problem.
- Added fix failed verification result reporting.

#### Improvements
- Execution order is now included in fix tracker output.
- Added internationalization support for SiteMenu and other components.
- Added internationalization support for the Carousel component.

### MARS

#### New Features
- Added implementation problems to the MarsReport.
- Added implementation problems to the publish output.

### browser-module-system

#### Improvements

### New Features

- Added a translation launcher for internationalization support.

### Bug Fixes

- `setHideFromAT` now correctly applies `aria-hidden="true"` when hiding elements from assistive technology.
- Smart remediations patches are no longer planned when smart remediations is disabled in the product configuration.
- Fixed syntax highlighting for open-source rules in versions 10.4 and above.
- Usage reports are no longer emitted unless explicitly enabled by the server configuration.

### Security

- Resolved known vulnerabilities in internal dependencies (tar, wrangler, glob).

generatedNotes:
### Bug Fixes

- Fixed an issue where the link name rule incorrectly identified the affected ability.
- Added a default role of `group` to the component fix.
- Fixed focus trapping to prevent keyboard events from propagating unexpectedly.
- Improved compatibility for generating message IDs across different environments, including HTTP contexts.

### Improvements

- Updated the setDescribedBy helper function and added it to the documentation.
- Enhanced FixRadio and FixRadioGroup to support custom attribute placement.
- Added "browse all" as a recognized weak link name term.
- Results marked as "does not apply" are now excluded from reports.
- Improved performance by caching the last computed report.
- Deferred API registration for improved loading performance.
- Dynamically imported the Mars adapter for improved loading performance.
- Working version fixes are now passed through to the scanner.

### Security

- Resolved security vulnerabilities in project dependencies.
